summary:
Perfect! The test script has passed. The issue was indeed the port mismatch in the Nginx configuration. By changing the `proxy_pass` directive from `http://127.0.0.1:5001` to `http://127.0.0.1:5000`, the Nginx server now correctly proxies requests to the Flask application, which is running on port `5000`.

The needle in the haystack was the incorrect port number in the Nginx configuration file.
